tasks.label: Test FastAPI endpoints with curl
tasks.command:
curl https://powerful-crag-32515-746bfe377fb4.herokuapp.com/ &&
curl -X POST https://powerful-crag-32515-746bfe377fb4.herokuapp.com/api/submit_feedback -H "Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJ1c2VyMTIzIn0.odcuX-3XYfCfAJ3nks4b8kWfmFQJaZMEDcewwSM69R4" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"feedback":"Test feedback","user_id":"user123"}' &&
curl -X GET https://powerful-crag-32515-746bfe377fb4.herokuapp.com/api/fetch_feedback -H "Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJ1c2VyMTIzIn0.odcuX-3XYfCfAJ3nks4b8kWfmFQJaZMEDcewwSM69R4" &&
curl -X POST https://powerful-crag-32515-746bfe377fb4.herokuapp.com/api/retrain_model -H "Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJ1c2VyMTIzIn0.odcuX-3XYfCfAJ3nks4b8kWfmFQJaZMEDcewwSM69R4" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '[{"feedback":"Test feedback","user_id":"user123"}]' &&
curl -X GET https://powerful-crag-32515-746bfe377fb4.herokuapp.com/api/insights -H "Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJ1c2VyMTIzIn0.odcuX-3XYfCfAJ3nks4b8kWfmFQJaZMEDcewwSM69R4" &&
curl -X GET https://powerful-crag-32515-746bfe377fb4.herokuapp.com/api/live_accuracy -H "Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJ1c2VyMTIzIn0.odcuX-3XYfCfAJ3nks4b8kWfmFQJaZMEDcewwSM69R4" &&
curl -X GET https://powerful-crag-32515-746bfe377fb4.herokuapp.com/api/audit_trail -H "Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJ1c2VyMTIzIn0.odcuX-3XYfCfAJ3nks4b8kWfmFQJaZMEDcewwSM69R4" &&
curl -X POST https://powerful-crag-32515-746bfe377fb4.herokuapp.com/block-domain -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"domain":"example.com"}'
